member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillDescriptorDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return bill descriptor data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillFieldsMapper
member.summary: Mapping methods for bill fields.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillHolderDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return bill data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return bill entry data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillConceptDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return bill entry data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillTaxEntryDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return bill tax entry data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillMapper
member.summary: Mapping methods for bill.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillQueryDateType
member.summary: Enumerates the bill dates query options.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Adapters.BillsQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve bills.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Data.BillData
member.summary: Provides data read and write methods for billing.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.Bill
member.summary: Represents a bill for an invoice, credit note, paycheck, payment reception, etc.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillCategory
member.summary: Represents a bill category like product sales or purchase, employee paycheck, etc.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillConcept
member.summary: Represents a bill concept with its tax entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillConceptSchemaData
member.summary: Holds schema-related data for a bill concept.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillFields
member.summary: Input fields DTO used to create and update bill.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillConceptFields
member.summary: Input fields DTO used to create and update bill concept.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxEntryFields
member.summary: Input fields DTO used to create and update bill tax entry.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillSchemaData
member.summary: Holds additional bill information according to the bill's schema.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillSecurityData
member.summary: Holds bill security data according to its schema.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillStatus
member.summary: Enumerates the control status of a bill.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillStatusEnumExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for BillStatus.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxEntry
member.summary: Holds tax data related to a bill or a bill concept.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxFactorType
member.summary: Enumerates a bill tax factor type.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxFactorTypeExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for BillTaxFactorType.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxMethod
member.summary: Enumerates a bill tax application method according to SAT Mexico fiscal rules.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillTaxMethodExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for BillTaxMethod.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.BillType
member.summary: Power type that represents a bill type like a sales bill type or purchase order bill type, a credit note, a paycheck, a payment reception, etc.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.SATMexicoImporter.SATBillDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return a SAT Mexico bill object.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.SATMexicoImporter.SATBillXmlReader
member.summary: Service used to read a bill as xml string and return a SATBillDto object.

member.name: T:Empiria.Billing.UseCases.BillUseCases
member.summary: Use cases to manage billing.
